name: drawing-management
description: Electron installer build for the Drawing Management desktop app

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.start:web: npm run build:frontend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production SERVE_FRONTEND=true npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.start:web:no-build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production SERVE_FRONTEND=true npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.dist:portable: npm run clean:release && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:all: npm run clean:release && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dist:setup: npm run clean:release && npm run build:frontend && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis

author: Decostyle
